reactions.name: conversion of a triglyceride into a 1,2-diglyceride
conversion of glycerol 3-phosphate into glycerone phosphate
conversion of a triglyceride into a 1,2-diglyceride

enzymes.evidence: First, triacylglycerol lipase, an enzyme localized to the oil body (storage vacuole) membrane, catalyzes the conversion of a triglyceride into a 1,2-diglyceride.
The predicted enzyme diglyceride lipase (coloured orange in the image) is theorized to catalyze the conversion of a 1,2-diglyceride into a 2-acylglycerol.

reactions.name: conversion of a 2-acylglycerol into a 1-monoglyceride
reactions.evidence: A 2-acylglycerol is spontaneously converted into a 1-monoglyceride.

enzymes.evidence: Acylhydrolase catalyzes the conversion of a 1-monoglyceride into glycerol.
Glycerol kinase catalyzes the conversion of glycerol into glycerol 3-phosphate.

reactions.name: conversion of glycerol 3-phosphate into glycerone phosphate

enzymes.evidence: Glycerol-3-phosphate dehydrogenase (coloured dark green in the image), localized to the mitochondrial inner membrane, catalyzes the conversion of glycerol 3-phosphate into glycerone phosphate.

reactions.name: conversion of glycerone phosphate into glycerol

enzymes.evidence: Acylhydrolase catalyzes the conversion of a 1-monoglyceride into glycerol.

reactions.name: conversion of glycerol into glycerone phosphate

enzymes.evidence: Glycerol kinase catalyzes the conversion of glycerol into glycerol 3-phosphate.
Glycerol-3-phosphate dehydrogenase (coloured dark green in the image), localized to the mitochondrial inner membrane, catalyzes the conversion of glycerol 3-phosphate into glycerone phosphate.

reactions.name: conversion of glycerone phosphate into glycerol

enzymes.evidence: Glycerol-3-phosphate dehydrogenase (coloured dark green in the image), localized to the mitochondrial inner membrane, catalyzes the conversion of glycerol 3-phosphate into glycerone phosphate.
